other_findings.finding: Pericyte 2 (inflammatory) shows upregulation of adhesion molecules involved in immune cell recruitment.
Spatial mapping indicates Pericyte 2 (inflammatory) clusters are enriched in perivascular regions of inflamed adult cortex.

evidence_quotes.quote: "Cluster: Pericyte_2_inflamm | Markers: VCAM1, ICAM1, SELE | logFC>1.5, adj.p<0.01"
evidence_quotes.context: List of cluster-specific marker genes identified by DE analysis.

evidence_quotes.quote: "Pericyte 2 (inflammatory) displays high expression of cell adhesion molecules (VCAM1, ICAM1, SELE) implicated in endothelial-immune interactions during adult neuroinflammation."
evidence_quotes.context: Summary annotation for each pericyte cluster.

evidence_quotes.quote: "In adult cortex, Pericyte 2 (inflammatory) is preferentially localized around vessels in regions with macrophage infiltration (see cluster heatmap, Supplementary Table 7)."
evidence_quotes.context: Spatial annotation data for pericyte subtypes.
